strengths: 15+ years of full-stack engineering across TypeScript/Node.js, React, and multiple languages
Current hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, workshops on testing)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in resume
Kotlin not mentioned; Java experience is older (robotics/mobile orchestration era)
Limited explicit mention of cloud-native Kubernetes work beyond GISCollective self-hosting

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and current Kotlin exposure

response.justification: Candidate brings well over the required 6 years of full-stack experience with a strong TypeScript/Node.js and React foundation, direct AI-agent/MCP work matching a key requirement, and a craftsmanship-oriented engineering culture (TDD, CI/CD, testing workshops). Gaps around Nest.js and recent Kotlin/Java work exist but are reasonably bridgeable given the polyglot background and demonstrated ability to pick the right tool for the job.
